message:
feat(handoff): add --auto flag for PreCompact auto-handoff

Adds gt handoff --auto --reason <reason> for structural auto-handoff
before context compaction. Saves state (collects hook/inbox/beads status,
sends handoff mail, writes marker) without cycling the session.

Combined with the compact/resume prime detection (previous commit), this
creates a seamless compaction cycle:
  PreCompact → gt handoff --auto → saves state
  Compaction runs
  SessionStart → gt prime --hook → detects compact, lighter output
  Agent resumes with identity + work status restored

Also wired into all 20 PreCompact hook overrides via gt hooks sync.

Closes: gt-j8n0h9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
